moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival runs from June 18-21, 2026, with headliners like Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure, plus many more artists across multiple stages.

angles.name: Main Stage Buzz
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight Festival is HERE! Who are you most hyped to see between Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris and The Cure this weekend?

angles.name: Hidden Gems
angles.copy: Beyond the headliners, IOW Fest has some incredible acts like Wet Leg, Rick Astley, and The Last Dinner Party. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Retro Vibes
angles.copy: From Sex Pistols (with Frank Carter) to Level 42 and Shed Seven, the Isle of Wight Festival is serving up some serious retro cool this year.

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Takes Over Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosts the TRNSMT Festival from June 19-21, 2026, featuring a massive lineup including Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Ready
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival is almost here! Glasgow, get ready for three days of incredible music with Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi leading the charge.

angles.name: Scottish Talent Spotlight
angles.copy: Don't miss Scottish stars like Amy Macdonald and The Snuts at TRNSMT this weekend! Who are you supporting?

angles.name: Beyond the Headliners
angles.copy: From Nile Rodgers & CHIC to Wolf Alice and The Last Dinner Party, TRNSMT's lineup is stacked with must-see acts.

moments.title: Harry Styles' Wembley Residency Continues
moments.blurb: Harry Styles' 'Together, Together' tour is playing multiple dates at Wembley Stadium in London this month, including tonight and several more dates through June.

angles.name: Wembley Calling
angles.copy: Are you one of the lucky ones heading to Wembley for Harry Styles tonight or later this month? What's your favourite song to hear live?

angles.name: Harry Mania
angles.copy: Harry Styles is making Wembley his home this June! If you could only hear one song, what would it be? #HarryStyles

moments.title: Happy Birthday Paul McCartney
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatle and Wings frontman Paul McCartney turns 84 years old on June 18, 2026.

angles.name: Macca's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! What's your all-time favourite Beatles or Wings track?

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Paul McCartney's 84th today! From Liverpool to global icon, his music continues to inspire generations.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Lionel Richie
moments.blurb: Music legend Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday on June 20, 2026.

angles.name: Hello Lionel!
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? Happy 77th Birthday to the incredible Lionel Richie! What's your go-to Lionel track?

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Dancing on the Ceiling or Easy? Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Lionel Richie!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Cyndi Lauper
moments.blurb: The iconic 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' singer, Cyndi Lauper, turns 73 on June 22, 2026.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Celebrate
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the fabulous Cyndi Lauper! What's your favourite track from this 80s icon?

angles.name: True Colors
angles.copy: Celebrating Cyndi Lauper's birthday today! Her voice and style are truly timeless.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ariana Grande
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on June 26, 2026.

angles.name: 33 for Ari
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande! What's your favourite song from her?

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon to global pop sensation, Happy Birthday Ariana Grande! Celebrate with your top track.

moments.title: World Cup: Scotland vs Morocco
moments.blurb: Scotland face Morocco in a crucial FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match on Friday, June 19, with kick-off at 11:00 PM UK time.

angles.name: Tartan Army Ready
angles.copy: It's a massive night for Scotland tomorrow as they take on Morocco in the World Cup! Can they push for the knockouts?

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: Who's staying up for Scotland's World Cup clash against Morocco tomorrow night? What are your predictions?

moments.title: World Cup: England vs Panama
moments.blurb: England will play Panama in the FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage on Saturday, June 27, at 5:00 PM ET (likely late evening UK time).

angles.name: Three Lions Roar
angles.copy: England's next World Cup challenge is Panama on Saturday 27th! How far do you think the Three Lions will go?

angles.name: Big Game Build-up
angles.copy: Counting down to England's World Cup match against Panama next weekend! Get your flags ready.

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year, occurs in the UK on Sunday, June 21, 2026, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the Summer Solstice this Sunday! It's the longest day of the year – how will you be making the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Stonehenge Sunrise
angles.copy: Thousands will gather at Stonehenge for sunrise on Sunday to celebrate the Summer Solstice. An ancient tradition for the longest day!

moments.title: Golowan Festival in Penzance
moments.blurb: Penzance's Golowan Festival, celebrating the summer solstice with music, dancing, and community, kicks off on June 19 and runs until June 28, 2026.

angles.name: Cornwall Celebrates
angles.copy: Penzance is buzzing! The Golowan Festival starts tomorrow, bringing music, dance, and vibrant community spirit to Cornwall for the Summer Solstice.

angles.name: Midsummer Magic
angles.copy: Heading to Penzance? Experience the magic of the Golowan Festival this week, a centuries-old midsummer celebration!

moments.title: Taylor Swift Holds UK No.1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is currently the UK's Official Singles Chart Number One for the week ending June 18, 2026.

angles.name: Swiftie Power
angles.copy: Another week, another No.1 for Taylor Swift! 'I Knew It, I Knew You' holds the top spot on the Official Singles Chart. Can anyone knock her off on Friday?

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at number one! Taylor Swift continues her chart domination. What's your favourite track in the current Official Singles Chart Top 40?

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 Finale
moments.blurb: The final episodes (7-8) of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 premiere globally on Prime Video today, June 17, 2026.

angles.name: Farm Finale
angles.copy: It's here! The final episodes of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 drop on Prime Video today. Are you ready for more Diddly Squat drama?

angles.name: Last Episodes
angles.copy: Jeremy Clarkson, Kaleb Cooper and the Diddly Squat gang are back for the last time this season. What's been your favourite moment so far?

moments.title: Love Island Season 13 Ongoing
moments.blurb: Love Island Season 13, hosted by Maya Jama, is currently airing, bringing a new batch of Islanders to Mallorca for a summer of romance and drama.

angles.name: Islanders in the Villa
angles.copy: Who's hooked on the new season of Love Island? Maya Jama is back and the drama is heating up in Mallorca!

angles.name: Summer Romance
angles.copy: Catching up on Love Island tonight? Who are your favourite couples and who do you think will be dumped next?

moments.title: Live Tennis: Queen's Club Championships
moments.blurb: Day 5 of the ATP & WTA Queen's Club Championships is live on BBC Two today, June 17, as players warm up for Wimbledon.

angles.name: Grass Court Action
angles.copy: Live tennis from Queen's Club today on BBC Two! Who are you backing for the title ahead of Wimbledon?

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: The build-up to Wimbledon continues with fierce competition at Queen's. Catch all the action this afternoon!

moments.title: Gorillaz at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
moments.blurb: Damon Albarn's Gorillaz play a huge headline show at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London on Friday, June 20, 2026.

angles.name: Virtual Band Live
angles.copy: Get ready for Gorillaz at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium this Friday! What's your favourite track from the animated band?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: Gorillaz are bringing their unique sound to London this week. Who's excited to see them live?

moments.title: Bad Bunny Plays London
moments.blurb: Puerto Rican superstar Bad Bunny brings his tour to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium for two nights on June 27 and 28, 2026.

angles.name: Bad Bunny in London
angles.copy: Bad Bunny is hitting Tottenham Hotspur Stadium next weekend! Are you ready for some Latin trap in London?

angles.name: Global Superstar
angles.copy: Two nights of Bad Bunny in London! Which of his hits are you hoping to hear?
